notes: RETROACTIVE ATTESTATION BACKFILL (ENG-OPS-002.R16, remediating GOV-A-001). CSV-marked 'Completed'; independent re-verification does not substantiate that claim, so this attestation records verdict=INCOMPLETE per the honesty protocol rather than fabricating a pass. IMPORTANT CORRECTION vs. the source reconciliation CSV (artifacts/reports/sprint-19/baseline/task-reconciliation.csv): that CSV lists 'PRs:590' for PG-209, but independent verification shows PR #590 ('feat(audit): #583 Sprint_plan phantom-Completed row audit', merged 2026-07-21) is the recent phantom-completed AUDIT tooling PR itself — it only touches artifacts/reports/phantom-completed-audit.json, docs/audit/*, and Docker-health scripts, and does not touch apps/web/src/app/tasks at all. It almost certainly matched because PG-209 is mentioned as text inside that audit's own output files, not because PR #590 delivered this feature. The reconciliation CSV's PR attribution for this task is therefore a false positive; treat #590 as unrelated to PG-209's actual delivery. What actually exists: a 16-line 'coming soon' placeholder page.tsx, added 2026-03-15 in commit 463445d54eea1901a0980ae03c637b9b9521e65b ('feat(web): add case, task, analytics, document, and agent-approval subpages') — confirmed via `git log --all --diff-filter=A` at the exact current path (single, unambiguous add event across all of history; no PR wraps this commit). Missing per the CSV's own ARTIFACT/DoD list: TaskTypesContent.tsx, task-types.router.ts, task-types validators, context_ack.json — none exist anywhere under any name. FLAGGED FOR HUMAN DECISION: revert CSV status or schedule real implementation; see the R16 PR body for the full 13-task pattern. This task's PR-attribution correction should also be reported back to whoever maintains the reconciliation tooling (artifacts/reports/sprint-19/baseline/reconcile.mjs) since it indicates the tool's PR-matching heuristic can attribute audit-tooling PRs to unrelated tasks.
